data.html:
@charset "UTF-8";
@layer reset, base, app.base;
._3fVNxW_gridLoader{opacity:.7;position:absolute;bottom:42%;left:47.4%;transform:rotateX(60deg)rotateY(3deg)scale(.85)rotate(43deg)}@media (max-width:1024px){._3fVNxW_gridLoader{bottom:99px;left:122px}}._3fVNxW_gridLoaderPong{top:19.9%;bottom:auto;left:26.6%;transform:rotateX(60deg)rotateY(3deg)scale(.87)rotate(43deg)}@media (max-width:1024px){._3fVNxW_gridLoaderPong{top:46px;left:68px}}._3fVNxW_gridLoaderAgent{top:1.4%;bottom:auto;left:47.4%;transform:rotateX(60deg)rotateY(3deg)scale(.9)rotate(43deg)}@media (max-width:1024px){._3fVNxW_gridLoaderAgent{top:2px;left:122px}}._3fVNxW_agentsWrapper{perspective:1000px;max-width:100%;display:flex;position:relative}._3fVNxW_agentsWrapper>svg{max-width:100%;height:auto}@media (max-width:1024px){._3fVNxW_agentsWrapper{margin-top:20px}}.GJ9TEa_benefits{padding-left:var(--homepage-padding-inset);padding-right:var(--homepage-padding-inset)}@media (max-width:1024px){.GJ9TEa_benefits{padding-left:0;padding-right:0}}.GJ9TEa_benefit{border-right:1px solid var(--color-border-translucent-strong);padding-left:var(--homepage-padding-inset);padding-right:var(--homepage-padding-inset);flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;height:468px;display:flex;position:relative}@media (max-width:1280px){.GJ9TEa_benefit{height:360px;padding-left:32px;padding-right:32px}}.GJ9TEa_benefit p{text-wrap:balance;max-width:368px}@media (max-width:1280px){.GJ9TEa_benefit p{text-wrap:initial}}.GJ9TEa_benefit:last-of-type{border:none;padding-right:0}@media (max-width:1024px){.GJ9TEa_benefit:last-of-type{padding-right:32px}}.GJ9TEa_benefit:first-of-type{padding-left:0}@media (max-width:1024px){.GJ9TEa_benefit:first-of-type{padding-left:32px}}.GJ9TEa_figure{top:0;left:var(--homepage-padding-inset);position:absolute}@media (max-width:1280px){.GJ9TEa_figure{left:32px}}.GJ9TEa_benefit:first-of-type>.GJ9TEa_figure{left:0}@media (max-width:1024px){.GJ9TEa_benefit:first-of-type>.GJ9TEa_figure{left:32px}}.GJ9TEa_illustration{flex:1;place-items:center;min-height:0;display:grid;overflow:hidden}.GJ9TEa_illustration>*{max-width:100%}.GJ9TEa_illustration>svg{height:auto}.GJ9TEa_carouselCard{border:1px solid var(--color-border-translucent);background:#0f1011;border-radius:8px;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;width:328px;height:440px;padding:0 24px 28px;display:flex}.GJ9TEa_carouselIllustration{flex:1;place-items:center;min-height:0;display:grid}.GJ9TEa_carouselIllustration svg{max-width:100%;max-height:100%}@media (max-width:1024px){.GJ9TEa_carouselIllustration svg{max-width:var(--mobile-width);height:auto}.GJ9TEa_momentum{margin-top:20px}}
